injuries.comment: The Predators said McCarron sustained a lower-body injury against Winnipeg on Saturday and is considered day-to-day, Brooks Bratten of the Predators' official site reports.
Marchessault did not play on Saturday's (Nov. 29) game against Winnipeg.
Barron is considered day-to-day due to a lower-body injury, as per Max Herz of 102.5 The Game Nashville reports Monday (Dec. 1).
